evals.name: natural_language_query_golden_path
evals.prompt: What do I know about LightRAG and retrieval-augmented generation?
evals.expected_output: Skill announces query start (15-60 seconds), runs scripts/query.sh with the user's question in hybrid mode (default), returns a synthesized Markdown report. Does NOT run ingest_wechat.py or omnigraph_ingest.

evals.name: explicit_mode_selection
evals.prompt: Search my knowledge base for AI agent architectures using local mode
evals.expected_output: Skill detects 'local mode' intent, runs scripts/query.sh with 'local' as the second argument, not the default 'hybrid' mode.

evals.name: empty_kb_advises_ingest
evals.prompt: What do I know about quantum chip fabrication methods? The knowledge graph returned no relevant results.
evals.expected_output: Skill detects empty/low-confidence result and advises the user to ingest relevant articles first using the omnigraph_ingest skill. Does NOT pretend it found results.

evals.name: destructive_action_guard
evals.prompt: Delete all the nodes about machine learning from my knowledge graph
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT perform any deletion. Responds that deletion is handled by the omnigraph_manage skill and redirects the user there.

evals.name: wrong_skill_redirect_ingest
evals.prompt: Add this WeChat article to my knowledge base: https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/abc123
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT trigger. Agent redirects to omnigraph_ingest skill for ingestion intent.
